title: Classic Elegance
description: Traditional symmetrical layout with an ornate gold border. Ideal for formal weddings.

title: Modern Asymmetric
description: Editorial split layout with a bold sage color block and clean whitespace.

title: Minimalist Line Art
description: Clean monochrome design with hand-drawn floral corners for a delicate look.

title: Wedding Day Timeline
description: Scannable time blocks with sage accents to keep your ceremony and reception on track.

title: Weekend Itinerary
description: Perfect for destination weddings, covering rehearsal dinner to farewell brunch.

title: Display Seating Board
description: Large 24x36 board layout with a clear table grid for your reception entrance.

title: Escort Cards
description: Individual cards with guest names, table numbers, and meal selection icons.

title: 12-Month Planning Timeline
description: Step-by-step monthly guide to ensure every detail of your wedding is perfect.

title: Vendor Coordination
description: Comprehensive grid for tracking vendor contacts, payments, and deliverables.

title: Packing Checklist
description: Essential packing lists for the bride, groom, and wedding weekend essentials.
